$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for MCP tool exposure, Codex/Claude config defaults, and MCP HTTP listener defaults. Do NOT duplicate these values in templates, generators, or docs without reading from this file. Consumers: src/tool-dispatcher.ts (server tool registry), src/admin/routes.ts (admin UI client-config snippets), src/server-types.ts (HTTP listener defaults), scripts/windows/gen-mcp-config.ps1 (build-time Codex/Claude config renderer). Drift is verified by tests/admin/config-drift.test.ts and tests/admin/port-drift.test.ts.
